text.title: Requirements Documentation Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the requirements-documentation methodology end-to-end.

step.name: compose-br
step.action: Draft BR (the why); reject solution-shaped phrasing.

step.name: derive-sh
step.action: Per stakeholder group, derive SH records.

step.name: decompose-sr
step.action: Decompose into SR (FR + NFR); add acceptance criteria.

step.name: lint
step.action: Frontmatter, glossary links, AC presence, source citation count.

step.name: commit
step.action: Commit to version control; tag baseline.
step.decision-gate: Validate against the output contract before declaring done; if invalid, loop back to the failing step.
